data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Customer notification of price changes', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is met. While the linked use case mentions that customers receive real-time updates about job duration and potential additional charges, there is no explicit evidence showing that notifications are sent specifically for price changes. Therefore, a gap exists in the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No explicit evidence confirming that customers are notified of price changes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add notification evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify customer notifications for price changes.
